title: hieracium elatius
intro: Hieracium elatius, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium elatius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium elatium can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
